sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48942" key="qolomigh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θολο-μῐγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n48942.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixed with dirt</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onat.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
